moments.title: Wimbledon Championships in Full Swing
moments.blurb: The world-famous tennis tournament is underway at the All England Club, running from June 29 to July 12, 2026.

angles.name: Live Action
angles.copy: Wimbledon 2026 is LIVE! Who are you backing for the men's and women's singles titles this year? Every serve, volley, and match point is happening now. #Wimbledon

angles.name: British Hopes
angles.copy: Strawberries and cream are out, and the British hopefuls are on court! Catch all the action from Wimbledon, running until July 12th.

moments.title: FIFA World Cup Round of 32 Continues
moments.blurb: The FIFA World Cup 2026 is in full swing across North America, with the knockout stages now underway and matches continuing daily until the final on July 19.

angles.name: Knockout Drama
angles.copy: World Cup Round of 32: Who's going through and who's going home? The knockout drama is heating up across the US, Canada, and Mexico!

angles.name: Game Day Buzz
angles.copy: Another day, another set of nail-biting World Cup clashes! Get your predictions in for today's Round of 32 fixtures.

moments.title: British Grand Prix at Silverstone
moments.blurb: Formula 1 takes over Silverstone this weekend, with the British Grand Prix running from July 3-5, 2026.

angles.name: F1 Weekend
angles.copy: Get ready for the roar! The British Grand Prix is at Silverstone this weekend, July 3-5. Who's taking pole position?

angles.name: Motorsport Excitement
angles.copy: The biggest weekend in British motorsport is almost here! Fingers crossed for some classic Silverstone drama at the British Grand Prix.

moments.title: Lytham Festival Kicks Off
moments.blurb: Lytham Festival, a five-day music extravaganza, is happening from July 1-5, 2026, featuring a wide range of famous names and musical genres.

angles.name: Lytham Live
angles.copy: Lytham Festival is officially ON! Five days of incredible music by the sea. Who are you heading to see?

angles.name: Festival Vibes
angles.copy: From rock to pop, Lytham Festival has it all this week! Catch the diverse lineup until Sunday.

moments.title: Sounds of the City Manchester
moments.blurb: Manchester's Castlefield Bowl hosts Sounds of the City from July 3-11, 2026, bringing a series of outdoor concerts to the city.

angles.name: Manchester Gigs
angles.copy: Sounds of the City returns to Castlefield Bowl this Friday! Who's ready for a week of epic live music in Manchester?

angles.name: Outdoor Concerts
angles.copy: Summer nights and live tunes are coming to Manchester! Sounds of the City kicks off on Friday.

moments.title: Llangollen International Musical Eisteddfod
moments.blurb: The Llangollen International Musical Eisteddfod in North Wales, a celebration of music and culture, runs from July 7-12, 2026.

angles.name: Welsh Culture
angles.copy: The Llangollen International Musical Eisteddfod is almost here! Get ready for a vibrant celebration of music and culture in North Wales, July 7-12.

angles.name: Global Music in Wales
angles.copy: Competitors from around the world are heading to Llangollen next week! Experience the unique atmosphere of this iconic Welsh festival.

moments.title: Sam Fender & Olivia Dean Top UK Singles Chart
moments.blurb: "Rein Me In" by Sam Fender and Olivia Dean is the current UK Official Singles Chart number one, as of the week ending July 2, 2026.

angles.name: New Number One
angles.copy: It's official! Sam Fender & Olivia Dean's 'Rein Me In' is your new UK Number 1. Huge congrats!

angles.name: Chart Topper
angles.copy: What a track! Sam Fender & Olivia Dean are at the top of the Official Singles Chart with 'Rein Me In'. Have you heard it yet?

moments.title: Enola Holmes 3 Premieres on Netflix
moments.blurb: Millie Bobby Brown returns as Sherlock's younger sister in 'Enola Holmes 3', which premieres globally on Netflix today, July 1, 2026.

angles.name: New Movie Alert
angles.copy: Your favourite teen detective is back! Enola Holmes 3 starring Millie Bobby Brown drops on Netflix today. Get watching!

angles.name: Netflix & Chill
angles.copy: Solving mysteries from your sofa? Enola Holmes 3 is now streaming on Netflix!

moments.title: 'Elle' (Legally Blonde Prequel) on Prime Video
moments.blurb: The 'Legally Blonde' prequel series, 'Elle', executive produced by Reese Witherspoon, which explores Elle Woods' high school years, premieres on Prime Video today, July 1, 2026.

angles.name: Bend and Snap Backstory
angles.copy: Before the bend and snap, there was 'Elle'! The Legally Blonde prequel series is out today on Prime Video. What were Elle Woods' high school years like?

angles.name: New Series
angles.copy: Calling all Legally Blonde fans! A brand new prequel series 'Elle' just dropped on Prime Video. Get ready for some early 90s fashion and drama!

moments.title: Happy 81st Birthday Debbie Harry
moments.blurb: Debbie Harry, the iconic lead singer of Blondie, celebrates her 81st birthday today, July 1, 2026.

angles.name: Blondie Icon
angles.copy: Happy 81st Birthday to the legendary Debbie Harry! Still looking cool as ever. What's your favourite Blondie track?

angles.name: Music Legend
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 81st Birthday to the one and only Debbie Harry of Blondie! An absolute icon.

moments.title: Happy 55th Birthday Missy Elliott
moments.blurb: Groundbreaking American rapper and record producer Missy Elliott celebrates her 55th birthday today, July 1, 2026.

angles.name: Hip-Hop Queen
angles.copy: Happy 55th Birthday to the incredible Missy Elliott! A true visionary who reshaped hip-hop. What's your top Missy track?

angles.name: Birthday Shoutout
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 55th Birthday to the one and only Missy Elliott! Get your freak on!

moments.title: Happy 76th Birthday Huey Lewis
moments.blurb: Huey Lewis, frontman of Huey Lewis & The News, will celebrate his 76th birthday on July 5, 2026.

angles.name: 80s Legend
angles.copy: The power of love! Huey Lewis turns 76 on Sunday. What's your favourite Huey Lewis & The News hit?

angles.name: Birthday Countdown
angles.copy: Getting ready to celebrate Huey Lewis's 76th birthday on Sunday! Still got that 'Heart of Rock & Roll'.

moments.title: Happy 86th Birthday Ringo Starr
moments.blurb: The legendary Beatles drummer Ringo Starr will celebrate his 86th birthday on July 7, 2026.

angles.name: Beatles Drummer
angles.copy: Peace and love! Ringo Starr turns 86 on Tuesday. Send your birthday wishes to the iconic Beatles drummer!

angles.name: Music Icon
angles.copy: An absolute legend of music. Ringo Starr celebrates his 86th birthday next week! What's your favourite Beatles track featuring Ringo on drums?

moments.title: Happy 62nd Birthday Courtney Love
moments.blurb: Singer and actress Courtney Love, known for her work with Hole, will celebrate her 62nd birthday on July 9, 2026.

angles.name: Rock Royalty
angles.copy: Rock icon Courtney Love turns 62 next week! What's your favourite Hole song?

angles.name: Birthday Vibes
angles.copy: Wishing a future Happy 62nd Birthday to the one and only Courtney Love on July 9th!

moments.title: Happy 51st Birthday Jack White
moments.blurb: Jack White, frontman of The White Stripes and a prolific musician and producer, will celebrate his 51st birthday on July 9, 2026.

angles.name: Modern Rock Legend
angles.copy: Happy 51st Birthday to the incredible Jack White next week! From The White Stripes to solo brilliance, what's your top track?

angles.name: Guitar Hero
angles.copy: Celebrating the birthday of a true guitar hero, Jack White, on July 9th!

moments.title: Pride in London 2026
moments.blurb: Pride in London, celebrating the LGBTQ+ communities, will hold its main parade and festivities on Saturday, July 4, 2026.

angles.name: Celebrate Pride
angles.copy: London will be vibrant with Pride this Saturday! Get ready to celebrate and support the LGBTQ+ community.

angles.name: London Calling
angles.copy: The Pride in London parade is happening this weekend! Expect a colourful and joyous celebration across the capital.

moments.title: NHS Birthday
moments.blurb: The National Health Service (NHS) celebrates its birthday on July 5, 2026, marking another year of dedicated service.

angles.name: Thank You NHS
angles.copy: This Sunday marks the NHS Birthday! A huge thank you to all the incredible staff for their tireless work.

angles.name: Celebrating Healthcare
angles.copy: The NHS turns another year older on Sunday! Let's show our appreciation for everyone who keeps our health service running.

moments.title: RHS Hampton Court Palace Garden Festival
moments.blurb: The RHS Hampton Court Palace Garden Festival, the world's largest flower festival, takes place from July 8-12, 2026.

angles.name: Garden Inspiration
angles.copy: Green fingers rejoice! The RHS Hampton Court Palace Garden Festival begins next Wednesday, July 8th. Time for some stunning floral inspiration!

angles.name: Flower Power
angles.copy: The world's largest flower festival is coming to Hampton Court Palace next week! Who's excited for the beautiful displays?
